class.script:
function n5poznotaods_as_text(): n5poznotaods_as_text="" end function
function n5poznotaods_curStawka_change(oldval):n5poznotaods_curStawka_change = true this_.curKwotaOds = ccur(wylicz_curKwotaOds) end function
function n5poznotaods_nLiczbaDni_change(oldval):n5poznotaods_nLiczbaDni_change = true this_.curKwotaOds = ccur(wylicz_curKwotaOds) end function
function n5poznotaods_curKwotaZal_change(oldval):n5poznotaods_curKwotaZal_change = true this_.curKwotaOds = ccur(wylicz_curKwotaOds) end function
function wylicz_curKwotaOds() wylicz_curKwotaOds = (this_.curStawka * this_.nLiczbaDni * this_.curKwotaZal) / 365 / 100 end function
function n5poznotaods_curKwotaOds_change(oldval):n5poznotaods_curKwotaOds_change = true this_.parent.curSumaOds = this_.parent.curSumaOds - oldval + this_.curKwotaOds end function
function n5poznotaods_listop(byval nInx) if nInx < 0 then 'usuwanie this_.parent.curSumaOds = this_.parent.curSumaOds - this_.curKwotaOds if not this_.pTransakcja is nothing then set this_.pTransakcja.pNotaOds = nothing end if end if n5poznotaods_listop = true end function
